title.ko: 금속의 압연 (B21에 포함되는 금속가공작업과 관련하여 사용되는 예비작업(보조작업)은 B21C, 롤링에 의한 벤딩은 B21D, 특별한 물건의 제조, 예를들면 롤링에 의한 스크류, 휠, 링, 배럴, 볼 제조는 B21H, 압연기에 의한 가압용접 B23K20/04 )
title.en: ROLLING OF METAL (auxiliary operations used in connection with metal-working operations covered in B21, seeB21C;bending by rolling B21D;manufacture of particular objects, e.g. screws, wheels, rings, barrels, balls, by rolling B21H;pressure welding by means of a rolling mill B23K0020040000)

definition.ko: 금속압연 일반 B21B1/00, B21B11/00, B21B13/00, B21B15/00 일반적 방법 또는 장치 B21B35/00, B21B37/00, B21B38/00, B21B39/00, B21B41/00 제어 또는 조작 B21B28/00, B21B33/00, B21B43/00 안전, 냉각, 보수 B21B27/00, B21B29/00, B21B31/00 압연기의 세부 B21B9/00 특별한 조건하의 금속압연 B21B15/00, B21B45/00, B21B47/00 금속압연과 관련되어 수행되는 보조작업 B21B3/00 특수합금의 압연 특수한 형상으로 제조하기 위한 압연 관 B21B17/00 ～ 23/00 압연방법 B21B25/00 맨드릴, 부속구 B21B5/00 폐쇄형상의 신장(EXTENDING) B21B99/00 이 서브 클래스의 다른 그룹으로 분류되지 않는 주제 사항

title.ko: 중실 또는 중공단면을 가진 반제품을 제조하기 위한 금속압연방법 또는 압연기(B21B 17/00내지 B21 23/00이 우선; 압연되는 재료의 조성에 관한 것은 B21B 3/00; 동시에 2개 소 이상이 압연되는 금속대의 폐쇄형상체의 연신 B21B 5/00, 금속압연스탠드의 단위체는 B21B 13/00, 움직이는 롤에 의해서 형성되는 벽을 가진 주형에서의 연속주조는 B22D 11/06) 압연기 열(列)에 의한 연속작업), 압연설비의 배열, 예. 스탠드의 집단화 연속 된 패스 또는 국부적 패스의 연속적 교대
title.en: Metal rolling methods or mills for making semi-finished products of solid or profiled cross-section (B21B0017000000-B21B0023000000 take precedence;with respect to composition of material to be rolled B21B0003000000;extending closed shapes of metal bands by simultaneous rolling at two or more zones B21B0005000000;metal-rolling stands as units B21B0013000000;continuous casting into moulds having walls formed by moving rolls B22D0011060000); Sequence of operations in milling trains; Layout of rolling-mill plant, e.g. grouping of stands; Succession of passes or of sectional pass alternations
for rolling heavy work, e.g. ingots, slabs, billets, in which the cross-sectional form is unimportant
in a continuous process
in a non-continuous process

title.ko: 특정한 횡단면을 가지는 압연작업, 예. 앵글 (특정한 제품의 제조를 위하여 특별히 설계된 반복성 있는 형상에서 길이가 부정형인 금속의 압연 B21H 8/00)
title.en: for rolling work of special cross-section, e.g. angle steel (rolling metal of indefinite length in repetitive shapes specially designed for the manufacture of particular objects B21H0008000000)
Piling sections having lateral edges specially adapted for interlocking with each other in order to build a wall
Rail sections

title.ko: ･･ H－또는 I－단면
title.en: H- or I-sections
L-sections
T-sections
U- or channel sections
Z-sections
in a single two-high or universal rolling mill
in a continuous process
in a non-continuous process
for rolling wire or material of like small cross-section
in a continuous process
in a non-continuous process

title.ko: 길이가 부정형인 금속밴드 또는 판의 압연을 위한 것(B21B 1/42가 우선)
title.en: for rolling bands or sheets of indefinite length (B21B0001420000 takes precedence)
in a continuous process
by hot-rolling
by cold-rolling
in a non-continuous process
in reversing mills, e.g. with intermediate storage reels for accumulating work
by hot-rolling
by cold-rolling

title.ko: 길이가 한정된 판의 압연을 위한 것(예. 접힌 판재, 겹쳐진 판재)(B21B 1/40이 우선; 압연 전의 금속판의 (접힘)또는 압연 후의 적층의 분리는 B21B 47/00)
title.en: for rolling sheets of limited length, e.g. folded sheets, superimposed sheets (B21B0001400000 takes precedence;folding sheets before, or separating layers after, rolling B21B0047000000)
for rolling foils which present special problems, e.g. because of thinness

title.ko: 단계압연 또는 유성압연을 위한 것(필그림(pilgrim-step)압연에 의한 관의 제조 B21B 21/00)
title.en: for step-by-step or planetary rolling (making tubes by pilgrim-step rolling B21B0021000000)

title.ko: 연속주조 이후 즉시 금속을 압연하기 위한 것(금속압연 스탠드 13/22; 연속주 조 B22D 11/00, 예. 롤을 갖는 주형에의 것 B22D 11/06)
title.en: for rolling metal immediately subsequent to continuous casting (metal-rolling stands B21B0013220000;continuous casting B22D0011000000, e.g. into moulds with rolls B22D0011060000)

title.ko: 합금의 조성이 특수한 압연방법 또는 압연순서를 필요로 하거나, 허용하는 특별한 합금재료의 압연(그것으로부터 얻어지는 조직강화 혹은 기계적특성 외에 합금의 특별한 금속성질을 변화시키는 것 C21D,C22F)
title.en: Rolling materials of special alloys so far as the composition of the alloy requires or permits special rolling methods or sequences (altering special metallurgical properties of alloys, other than structure consolidation or mechanical properties resulting therefrom C21D, C22F)
Rolling special iron alloys

title.ko: 압연에 의한 금속대의 폐쇄형상체의 신장(원통체의 제조, 예. 휠 림의 제조 B21H 1/06)
title.en: Extending closed shapes of metal bands by rolling (manufacture of circular shapes, e.g. wheel rims, B21H0001060000)
Measures for carrying out rolling operations under special conditions, e.g. in vacuum or inert atmosphere to prevent oxidation of work; Special measures for removing fumes from rolling mills
Subsidising the rolling processes by subjecting rollers or work to vibrations

title.ko: 금속압연스탠드, 즉. 스탠드 프레임, 롤 및 부속품으로 된 조립체(B21B17/00 ~ B21B23/00이 우선)
title.en: Metal-rolling stands, i.e. an assembly composed of a stand frame, rolls, and accessories (B21B0017000000-B21B0023000000 take precedence)
with axes of rolls arranged horizontally
Three-high arrangement
with axes of rolls arranged vertically
with differently-directed roll axes, e.g. for the so-called "universal" rolling process
all axes being arranged in one plane
axes being arranged in different planes

title.ko: 부하시 롤의 편향을 방지하기 위해 역압을 롤에 가하는 장치를 가지는 것) (이와 같은 역압을 가하는 장치는 B21B 29/00)
title.en: having counter-pressure devices acting on rolls to inhibit deflection of same under load (counter-pressure devices as such B21B0029000000)
with alternatively operative rolls

title.ko: 단계압연 또는 유성압연을 위한 것(방법은 B21B 1/42; 필그림(pilgrim-step)압연에 의한 관의 제조 B21B 21/00)
title.en: for step-by-step or planetary rolling (methods B21B0001420000;making tubes by pilgrim-step rolling B21B0021000000)
for planetary rolling

title.ko: 연속주조 후에 즉시 금속을 압연하기 위한 것(방법은 1/46; 연속주조는 B22D 11/00, 예. 롤을 갖는 주조에 의한 것 B22D 11/06)
title.en: for rolling metal immediately subsequent to continuous casting (methods therefor B21B0001460000;continuous casting B22D0011000000, e.g. into moulds with rolls B22D0011060000)
Arrangements for performing additional metal-working operations specially combined with or arranged in, or specially adapted for use in connection with, metal-rolling mills
in which work is subjected to permanent internal twisting, e.g. for producing reinforcement bars for concrete

title.ko: 롤축이 가공재의 축에 대하여 본질적으로 수직으로 배치되어 있는 롤에 의한 관의 압연, 예. 관의 축대칭 압연법
title.en: Rolling methods or mills specially designed for making or processing tubes

title.ko: 롤축이 가공재의 축에 대하여 본질적으로 수직으로 배치되어 있는 롤에 의한 관의 압연, 예. 관의 축대칭 압연법
title.en: Tube-rolling by rollers of which the axes are arranged essentially perpendicular to the axis of the work, e.g. "axial" tube-rolling

title.ko: 맨드릴을 갖는 것(B21B 17/08이 우선)
title.en: with mandrel (B21B0017080000 takes precedence)
in a continuous process
in a discontinuous process
with mandrel having one or more protrusions
in a continuous process
in a discontinuous process
without mandrel

title.ko: 롤러가 소재의 외측에 있고 소재축에 대해서 수직으로 배치되어 있지 않은 롤러에 의한 관의 압연(롤러에 의한 교정 B21D)
title.en: Tube-rolling by rollers arranged outside the work and having their axes not perpendicular to the axis of the work (straightening by rollers B21D)

title.ko: 소재축에 대하여 본질적으로 대각선상에 배치되어 있는 롤에 의한 압연, 예. 교차관압연
title.en: the axes of the rollers being arranged essentially diagonally to the axis of the work, e.g. "cross" tube-rolling
Rolling basic material of solid, i.e. non-hollow, structure; Piercing

title.ko: 중공소재의 압연(B21B 19/04가 우선; 맨드릴로부터 분리작업은 B21C 45/00)
title.en: Rolling hollow basic material (B21B0019040000 takes precedence;separating work from mandrel B21C0045000000)
Enlarging tube diameter
Finishing, e.g. smoothing, sizing
the axes of the rollers being arranged essentially parallel to the axis of the work
Rolling tubes by means of additional rollers arranged inside the tubes
Rolling tubes without additional rollers arranged inside the tubes

title.ko: 관의 필그림(Pilgrim-step)압연
title.en: Pilgrim-step tube-rolling
Rollers therefor

title.ko: 필그림압연에 있어서의 이송기구(B21B 21/06이 우선)
title.en: Pilgrim-step feeding mechanisms (B21B0021060000 takes precedence)
Devices for revolving work between the steps

title.ko: 그룹 B21B17/00-B21B21/00의 어느 방법에 한정되어 있지 아니한 관의 압연, 예. 복합된 공정(B21B 25/00 이 우선)
title.en: Tube-rolling not restricted to methods provided for in only one of groups B21B0017000000-B21B0021000000, e.g. combined processes (B21B0025000000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 금속관 압연기를 위한 맨드릴, 예. 그룹 B21B17/00에 포함되는 방법으로 사용되는 형태의 맨드릴; 그를 위한 부속품 또는 보조수단
title.en: Mandrels for metal tube rolling mills, e.g. mandrels of the types used in the methods covered by group B21B0017000000; Accessories or auxiliary means therefor
Guides, supports, or abutments for mandrels, e.g. carriages; Adjusting devices for mandrels
Cooling or lubricating mandrels during operation
Interchanging mandrels

title.ko: 롤(특수한 공정이 요구되는 가공표면의 형상은 B21B 1/00) ; 사용중의 롤을 윤활, 가열, 냉각
title.en: Rolls (shape of working surfaces required by special processes B21B0001000000); Lubricating, cooling or heating rolls while in use

title.ko: 롤의 형상 또는 구조(특별한 물을 제조하기 위해서 특별히 설계된 반복성이 있는 형상을 가진 부정형의 길이의 금속을 압연하기 위한 것은 B21H 8/02)
title.en: Shape or construction of rolls (for rolling metal of indefinite length in repetitive shapes specially designed for the manufacture of particular objects B21H0008020000)
Sleeved rolls
with deflectable sleeves
Lubricating, cooling, or heating rolls
internally
externally

title.ko: 효과적 상태로의 압연롤 또는 압연장치의 보수(사용중에 있어서 롤의 윤활, 냉각 또는 가열은 B21B 27/06)
title.en: Maintaining rolls or rolling equipment in effective condition (lubricating, cooling or heating rolls while in use B21B0027060000)
Maintaining rolls in effective condition, e.g. reconditioning
while in use, e.g. polishing
Counter-pressure devices acting on rolls to inhibit deflection of same under load, e.g. backing rolls

title.ko: 압연스탠드의 구조; 마운팅(설치), 조정, 롤 교체, 롤 설치, 스탠드 프레임
title.en: Rolling stand structures; Mounting, adjusting, or interchanging rolls, roll mountings, or stand frames

title.ko: 압연 스탠드 지지체(프레임); 롤의 마운팅(설치)
title.en: Rolling stand frames; Roll mountings
with tie rods, e.g. prestressed tie rods

title.ko: 기초 상에 스탠드 또는 지지체의 고착, 예. 바닥판에서의 고착(일반 F16M)
title.en: Fastening stands or frames to foundation, e.g. to the sole plate (in general F16M)

title.ko: 롤베어링의 적용(베어링 일반 F16C)
title.en: Adaptation of roll bearings (bearings in general F16C)
Interchanging rolls, roll mountings, or stand frames
by horizontally displacing
by vertically displacing
by pivotally displacing

title.ko: 롤의 조정(제어장치 B21B 37/00)
title.en: Adjusting rolls (control devices B21B0037000000)
by moving rolls axially
by moving rolls perpendicularly to roll axis
mechanically
by screws
Adjusting eccentrically-mounted roll bearings
by toggle-lever mechanisms
by wedges or their equivalent
by liquid pressure

title.ko: 달리 분류되지 않는 안전장치(안전장치 일반은 F16P) 브레이커 블록; 물려진 롤을 자유롭게 하는 장치
title.en: Safety devices not otherwise provided for (safety devices in general F16P); Breaker blocks; Devices for freeing jammed rolls
Preventing fracture of rolls

title.ko: 금속압연기의 구동
title.en: Drives for metal-rolling mills

title.ko: 연속적으로 작동하는 압연기를 위한 것(B21B 35/10, B21B 35/12가 우선)
title.en: for continuously-operating mills (B21B0035100000, B21B0035120000 take precedence)
each stand having its own motor or motors

title.ko: 불연속으로 작동하는 압연기 또는 단독스탠드를 위한 것(35/10, 35/12가 우선)
title.en: for non-continuously-operating mills or for single stands (B21B0035100000, B21B0035120000 take precedence)
for reversing rolling mills
Driving arrangements for rolls which have only a low-power drive; Driving arrangements for rolls which receive power from the shaft of another roll
Toothed-wheel gearings specially adapted for metal-rolling mills; Housings or mountings therefor

title.ko: 금속압연기에 특히 적용되던가 또는 마련되는 커플링, 구동스핀들, 스핀들 캐리어(커플링 또는 축 일반은 F16)
title.en: Couplings, driving spindles, or spindle carriers specially adapted for or specially arranged in metal-rolling mills (couplings or shafts in general F16)

title.ko: 금속압연기에 특히 적용되는 제어장치 제어방법 또는 그들 장치로 생산되는 제품(특히 금속압연기에 적용되는 측정에 관한 장치 및 방법은 B21B 38/00)
title.en: Control devices or methods specially adapted for metal-rolling mills or the work produced thereby (methods or devices for measuring specially adapted for metal-rolling mills B21B0038000000)

title.ko: 두께, 폭, 지름 또는 기타 교차되는 치수에 대한 제어(B21B 37/58이 우선)
title.en: Control of thickness, width, diameter or other transverse dimensions (B21B0037580000 takes precedence)
Automatic gauge control
in tandem mills
Lateral spread control; Width control, e.g. by edge rolling
Automatic variation of thickness according to a predetermined program
for obtaining one strip having successive lengths of different constant thickness

title.ko: 스트립, 판재를 압연하는 동안 평탄도 또는 측면도의 제어
title.en: Control of flatness or profile during rolling of strip, sheets or plates
using roll camber control
by cooling, heating or lubricating the rolls
by hydraulic expansion of the rolls
by radial displacement of the roll sleeve on a stationary roll beam by means of hydraulic supports

title.ko: 롤밴딩을 사용하는 것(B21B 37/42가 우선)
title.en: using roll bending (B21B0037420000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 롤의 축이동을 사용하는 것(B21B 37/42가 우선)
title.en: using axial shifting of the rolls (B21B0037420000 takes precedence)
using a combination of roll bending and axial shifting of the rolls
using heating, lubricating or water-spray cooling of the product

title.ko: 롤의 속도 또는 구동모터의 제어(B21B 37/52, B21B 37/60이 우선)
title.en: Roll speed or drive motor control (B21B0037520000, B21B0037600000 take precedence)
Tension control; Compression control
by looper control
by drive motor control
including coiler drive control, e.g. reversing mills
Elongation control
Roll-force control; Roll-gap control
by control of a motor which drives an adjusting screw
by control of a hydraulic adjusting device
Mill spring or roll spring compensation systems, e.g. control of prestressed mill stands
Roll eccentricity compensation systems
Camber or steering control for strip, sheets or plates, e.g. preventing meandering

title.ko: 길이 제어(B21B 37/56이 우선)
title.en: Length control (B21B0037560000 takes precedence)
Rear end control; Front end control

title.ko: 온도제어, 예. 롤 또는 제품의 냉각 또는 가열(B21B 37/32, B21B 37/44가 우선)
title.en: Temperature control, e.g. by cooling or heating the rolls or the product (B21B0037320000, B21B0037440000 take precedence)
Cooling control on the run-out table
Control of tube rolling
Methods or devices for measuring specially adapted for metal-rolling mills, e.g. position detection, inspection of the product
for measuring flatness or profile of strips
for measuring thickness, width, diameter or other transverse dimensions of the product
for measuring tension or compression
for measuring roll-force
for measuring roll-gap, e.g. pass indicators
for measuring roll camber

title.ko: 39/00 금속압연기와 관련한 사용을 위해 결합, 조립 또는 용도에 특히 적용되어 가공물을 이송, 지지 또는 위치선정하고 가공물의 이동을 제어하는 장치
title.en: Arrangements for moving, supporting, or positioning work, or controlling its movement, combined with or arranged in, or specially adapted for use in connection with, metal-rolling mills (guiding, conveying, or accumulating easily-flexible work in loops or curves B21B0041000000;specially associated with cooling-beds B21B0043000000;conveying or transporting in general B65G)

title.ko: 소재의 공급 또는 지지; 제동장치 또는 장력장치
title.en: Feeding or supporting work; Braking or tensioning arrangements

title.ko: 운반을 목적으로 하는 소재의 승강, 예. 패스의 직전 직후에 배치되는 틸팅 테이블(단지 회전 또는 조작수단만은 B21B 39/20)
title.en: Lifting or lowering work for conveying purposes, e.g. tilting tables arranged immediately in front of or behind the pass (turn-over or like manipulating means as such B21B0039200000)
Pushing or forcing work into pass
Braking or tensioning arrangements
Arrangement or installation of feeding rollers in rolling stands
Arrangement or installation of roller tables in relation to a roll stand

title.ko: 소재의 안내, 위치결정 또는 정렬(B21B 43/12가 우선; 소재가 영구적 내부 비틀림을 받기 위한 안내는 B21B 15/02)
title.en: Guiding, positioning or aligning work (B21B0043120000 takes precedence;guides in which work is subjected to permanent internal twisting B21B0015020000)
immediately before entering or after leaving the pass
Switches for directing work in metal-rolling mills or trains

title.ko: 소재의 회전, 뒤집기 또는 유사한 조작(가공물이 영구적 내부 비틀림을 받기 위한 안내는 B21B 15/02)
title.en: Revolving, turning-over, or like manipulation of work (guides in which work is subjected to permanent internal twisting B21B0015020000)

title.ko: 경사에 의한 것, 예. 레버 또는 쐐기에 의해서 일단을 들어올리는 것에 의한 것(B21B 39/26, B21B 39/28이 우선)
title.en: by tipping, e.g. by lifting one side by levers or wedges (B21B0039260000, B21B0039280000 take precedence)
by tongs or grippers
by members, e.g. grooved, engaging opposite sides of the work and moved relatively to each other to revolve the work
by means of guide members shaped to revolve the work during its passage
by lodging it in a rotating ring manipulator or ring segment manipulator
Devices specially adapted for turning sheets

title.ko: 그룹 B21B 39/02, B21B 39/14, B21B 39/20의 한 그룹 이상에 포함되는 작용을 수행하기 위해서 특별히 설계된 장치 또는 구조적 결합
title.en: Arrangements or constructional combinations specifically designed to perform functions covered by more than one of groups B21B0039020000, B21B0039140000, B21B0039200000
Guiding, conveying, or accumulating easily-flexible work, e.g. wire, sheet metal bands, in loops or curves; Loop lifters
Returning work to repeat the pass or passes
above or underneath the rolling stand or rolls
in which the direction of movement of the work is turned through approximately 180°
without overall change in the general direction of movement of the work
Loop deflectors
Arrangements of interest only with respect to provision for indicating or controlling operations

title.ko: 고정식 또는 가동식의 냉각상; 특히 냉각상과 관련된 수단, 예. 소재를 제동하기 위한 수단 또는 냉각상에 또는 냉각상으로부터 소재를 운반하기 위한 수단(운반 수단 일반은 B65G)
title.en: Cooling beds, whether stationary or moving; Means specially associated with cooling beds, e.g. for braking work or for transferring it to or from the bed (conveying means in general B65G)

title.ko: 갈퀴 또는 봉으로 구성된 냉각상(B21B 43/10이 우선)
title.en: Cooling beds comprising rakes or bars (B21B0043100000 takes precedence)
Cooling beds comprising rolls or worms

title.ko: 캐리지로 구성된 냉각상(B21B 43/08이 우선)
title.en: Cooling beds comprising carriages (B21B0043080000 takes precedence)
Cooling beds comprising revolving drums or recycling chains
Cooling beds with other work-shifting elements projecting through the bed
Devices for positioning workpieces "flushed", i.e. with all their axial ends arranged in line on cooling beds or on co-operating conveyors

title.ko: 금속 압연기에 관련한 사용에 적용되거나, 조합 혹은 배치되는 소재의 표면처리장치(15/00이 우선; 스케일 제거 장치의 기술적 특징은 B21C 43/00)
title.en: Devices for surface treatment of work, specially combined with or arranged in, or specially adapted for use in connection with, metal-rolling mills (B21B0015000000 takes precedence;technical features of scaling-off devices B21C0043000000)
for lubricating, cooling, or cleaning

title.ko: 스케일 제거를 위한 것
title.en: for de-scaling

title.ko: 스트립 재료의 것(B21B 45/08이 우선)
title.en: of strip material (B21B0045080000 takes precedence)
hydraulically

title.ko: 다층금속판의 압연에 관한 보조구, 장치 또는 방법(균열로는 C21D 9/70)
title.en: Auxiliary arrangements, devices or methods in connection with rolling of multi-layer sheets of metal (soaking pits C21D0009700000)
for folding sheets before rolling
for separating layers after rolling
Subject matter not provided for in other groups of this subclass
